title: Scaling & Polishing
description: Achieve a cleaner, fresher smile with professional dental cleaning that removes plaque, tartar, and stubborn stains. Our advanced scaling and polishing protocols help prevent gum disease, bad breath, and tooth discoloration. This treatment reaches areas that standard brushing and flossing miss, ensuring long-term periodontal health and a radiant finish.

sub_treatments.title: Deep Curettage
sub_treatments.description: Cleaning below the gumline to treat early-stage periodontal issues.

sub_treatments.title: Diamond Polishing
sub_treatments.description: A refined finishing process for ultra-smooth and shiny tooth surfaces.

sub_treatments.title: Gum Depigmentation
sub_treatments.description: Treatments for dark or patchy gum tissue to restore a healthy pink glow.

title: Teeth Whitening
description: Illuminate your smile with our professional teeth whitening systems. We use high-grade, enamel-safe bleaching agents combined with light-activation technology to lift years of staining from coffee, tea, and age. This non-invasive cosmetic procedure can brighten your teeth by several shades in just one appointment, giving you instant confidence.

sub_treatments.title: In-Office Power Whitening
sub_treatments.description: Fast-acting professional whitening for those needing immediate transformation.

sub_treatments.title: Home Whitening Kits
sub_treatments.description: Customized trays for convenient, gradual brightening at home.

title: Dental Implants
description: Experience the gold standard in tooth replacement. Dental implants provide a permanent, root-like foundation for missing teeth, preventing bone loss and facial sagging. Designed to look and function exactly like natural teeth, our implants offer unmatched stability for eating, speaking, and smiling without the worry of shifting dentures.

sub_treatments.title: Osseointegrated Placement
sub_treatments.description: Precision surgical placement of the implant post into the jawbone.

sub_treatments.title: Implant-Supported Crowns
sub_treatments.description: Bespoke ceramic restorations that connect seamlessly to the implant.

sub_treatments.title: All-on-4 / All-on-6
sub_treatments.description: Full-arch restoration for patients missing most or all of their teeth.

title: Paediatric Dentistry
description: Providing gentle and compassionate dental care for our youngest patients. We focus on building a positive foundation for lifelong oral health in a fun, stress-free environment. From preventive sealants to early-age screenings, our paediatric specialists ensure that every child leaves with a healthy smile and a fearless attitude toward dentistry.

sub_treatments.title: Pit & Fissure Sealants
sub_treatments.description: Protective coatings applied to molars to prevent childhood cavities.

sub_treatments.title: Pulp Therapy (Pulpotomy)
sub_treatments.description: Saving baby teeth from infection to maintain space for permanent teeth.

sub_treatments.title: Space Maintainers
sub_treatments.description: Devices that ensure adult teeth have enough room to erupt properly.

title: Preventive & Basic Care
description: The secret to a healthy smile is proactive care. Our preventive services are designed to detect issues before they become painful or expensive. Through regular check-ups, diagnostic X-rays, and fluoride treatments, we help you maintain your natural teeth for a lifetime while avoiding complex procedures.

sub_treatments.title: Digital X-Ray Diagnostics
sub_treatments.description: Low-radiation imaging to detect hidden decay and structural issues.

sub_treatments.title: Sensitivity Treatment
sub_treatments.description: Professional applications to reduce tooth sensitivity to hot and cold.

title: Restorative & Root Canal
description: Eliminate pain and save damaged teeth with advanced restorative and endodontic therapy. Our modern root canal procedures are highly precise and virtually painless. By removing infection from the pulp and sealing the tooth, we restore strength and functionality, preventing the need for extractions.

sub_treatments.title: Laser-Assisted RCT
sub_treatments.description: Using advanced light technology to disinfect canals more effectively.

sub_treatments.title: Composite Fillings
sub_treatments.description: Metal-free, tooth-colored restorations for cavities and cracks.

sub_treatments.title: Fiber Post Reinforcement
sub_treatments.description: Structural support for teeth that have undergone significant decay.

title: Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
description: When surgical intervention is required, we provide expert care using state-of-the-art surgical protocols. From complex wisdom tooth extractions to minor tissue biopsies, our focus is on surgical precision, minimal trauma, and rapid post-operative recovery for every patient.

sub_treatments.title: Wisdom Tooth Extraction
sub_treatments.description: Surgical removal of impacted molars causing pain or crowding.

sub_treatments.title: Bone Grafting
sub_treatments.description: Rebuilding jawbone density to support future dental implants.

sub_treatments.title: Operculectomy
sub_treatments.description: Removal of overlapping gum tissue to treat recurrent infections.
